description: A shipment booked with a 'Guaranteed by 10 AM' service was delivered late. The company is entitled to a full refund.

nodes.task_description: The system receives the delivery confirmation from the carrier, noting the delivery time was 11:30 AM.

expected_outcome.value: The system captures the actual delivery time.

nodes.task_description: The system compares the actual delivery time to the guaranteed time and flags a 'Service Failure'.

expected_outcome.value: An alert is created for the service failure.

nodes.task_description: An agent submits a 'Guaranteed Service Failure' claim to the carrier to have the freight charges refunded.

expected_outcome.value: A claim is filed to recover the shipping costs.
